overview: Nexus is a full-featured placement management war room for college administrators. It provides real-time KPI tracking, deep analytics across departments and batches, failure analysis, mock interviews, and an AI-powered resume editor — all in a blue-themed, responsive dashboard.
features: 6 animated KPI cards with trend indicators and sparklines
Monthly placement trend charts with weekly/monthly/quarterly toggle
Department performance table with color-coded placement rates
Application pipeline funnel with conversion rates
Deep analytics with multi-select filters persisted in URL
Failure analysis and at-risk student prediction
Company analytics with package distribution and drive calendar
Skill demand vs supply gap analysis
Top 10 student leaderboard with gold/silver/bronze badges
Mock interview simulator with question bank and scoring
Built-in resume editor with AI scanning and ATS score
